description_for_human: Information about Subodh KC, AI Systems Architect & Governance Expert. Services, products, courses, and AI compliance tools.
description_for_model: Subodh KC is an AI Systems Architect and Governance Expert at HP Inc. (Fortune 50). He offers AI architecture, governance, and compliance services. Products include HAIEC (AI compliance platform), KestrelVoice (AI voice operations), llmverify (LLM monitoring), and more. He teaches a monthly AI Governance & Compliance Masterclass and hosts a free webinar on AI Laws for Small Business.

services.name: AI Architecture & Integration
services.description: Agentic AI systems, RAG pipelines, MCP integrations, workflow architecture

services.name: AI Operations & Deployment
services.description: Voice agents, monitoring, production hardening, human escalation

services.name: AI Governance & Assurance
services.description: EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, NYC LL 144 compliance, evidence architecture, drift controls

products.name: HAIEC
products.description: Enterprise AI governance and compliance platform

products.name: llmverify
products.description: Runtime health monitor for LLM apps

courses.name: AI Governance & Compliance Masterclass
courses.description: Live online course covering AI architecture, governance, compliance, and audit readiness
courses.schedule: 1st & 3rd Thursday of every month, 8 PM CST

events.name: AI Laws and Policies for Small Business
events.description: Free monthly webinar on AI regulations for small businesses
